Discover
Foundation

About Theory U

Developed by Dr. Otto Scharmer at MIT Sloan, Theory U blends rigorous action research with practices that connect science, consciousness, and profound social innovation.

Over three decades, it has guided thousands of organizations and communities worldwide as a leadership and change-management framework — helping teams sense emerging futures, prototype solutions, and scale systemic change.

The U-shaped journey moves from co-initiating and co-sensing to presencing, then co-creating and co-evolving — a complete transformation of how leadership is practiced.

Essential Reading
The Journey

Crossing the Threshold

Stepping into the field of the future — from downloading past patterns all the way to performing by operating on the whole.

Trusted by World-Class Organizations

Programme

Two Days of Deep Transformation

Day One
Day Two
Foundation & Awareness
May 23, 2026
The Bankruptcy of Current Management Theory
Discover why traditional management frameworks are reaching their limits and what lies beyond them.
A New Paradigm of Leadership and Culture
Introduction to the emerging leadership model that integrates consciousness, purpose, and systemic thinking.
Learning from the Emerging Future
Move beyond learning from the past — discover how to sense and act from the future as it emerges.
From Symptom Thinking to Systems Thinking
Develop the capacity to see the whole system, not just surface-level symptoms and quick fixes.
Deep Listening Techniques
Master the four levels of listening that transform how you hear, understand, and connect with others.
Building Profound Relationships & Stakeholder Partnerships
Create the conditions for genuine, trust-based partnerships that accelerate your organisation's impact.
Transformation & Mastery
May 24, 2026
Diagnosing Non-Productive Team Cultures
Identify hidden cultural patterns that silently sabotage performance — and learn how to transform them.
Performance-Transforming Conversational Frameworks
Practical tools and language structures that shift conversations from conflict to co-creation.
Problem Solving Through Collective Intelligence
Harness the distributed wisdom of your team and stakeholders to solve complex, adaptive challenges.
Connecting to Higher Self & Higher Purpose
A profound inner practice that aligns your leadership with what matters most — your deepest purpose.
Practical Applications
Apply the frameworks directly to your most pressing real-world leadership and organisational challenges.
Next Steps for Mastery
Design your personal roadmap for continuing the transformation beyond the workshop.

Transform Your Leadership & Organisation

Strategic Vision

Better Decisions

Tap collective intelligence for wiser, faster choices that your whole organisation can commit to.

Purpose-Driven Leadership

Align your leadership fully to your authentic purpose and values — the wellspring of extraordinary impact.

Accelerated Results

Co-create the future with your key stakeholders, unlocking momentum that no individual effort could achieve.

Participant Voices

What Participants Say

Selected responses from CXO cohorts, alumni journeys, and leadership transformation work across industries.

"

If you listen to people from the heart, you get to know a lot many things and can transform organizations better.

Harshal Shah
Founder & Director
"

The culture shift is: when you face a problem, park your reaction, think with a peaceful mind, and you arrive at a better solution.

Sanjay Chaturvedi
VP Sales
"

During the case clinic journey, I understood that my problems are not the actual problem — you can solve them in a different way.

Rasesh Jani
Industry Professional, IT Industry
"

Until now if someone spoke, we would keep going without listening. After this program, being silent, thinking, and then replying — this is a very big thing.

Mahendra Kumar Yadav
Infrastructure Professional
"

My patience improved and my ability to sense new possibilities that want to emerge has expanded. By letting go of fear, I'm open to new ideas and taking actions in those areas.

Sai Krishna Rao
Head – Education Initiative
"

I apply insights from the emerging future in my decisions and the results are extraordinary. My relationship with my team, clients, and family is at a totally different level.

Sanjay Kumar
Entrepreneur & IT Company Founder
"

It is nothing about me as ego — it is completely eco. Even today the dialysis unit holds the space of healing. Patients come and get treated despite everything around it.

Usha Kulkarni
Healthcare Leader
"

I feel limitless right now. My boundaries opened up — the moment I opened up, I became resourceful to feed Kenyan refugees. Every week about 300 people get food, clothes, and dignity.

The greatest impact was on conversations — levels of listening created so much greater ways for me to be at ease in any kind of communication, from personal to professional to my global purpose.

Theory U doesn't just teach you how to do things — it also teaches you how to do the right things. In 35 years across organisations, I found it has something very special for all of us.

Advisor – Corporate Affairs & PR
Your Guide

Meet Your Facilitator

Manoj Onkar

OD Consultant · Master Coach · Senior Facilitator

With over 28 years of experience in organisational development, coaching, and training, Manoj Onkar is an adept OD Consultant and master coach who has trained and certified hundreds of trainers and coaches across B2B, B2C, and education sectors.

Since 2015, Manoj and his team have leveraged Theory U for specialised workshops and consulting, elevating consciousness in organisations, society, and individuals — transforming how leaders think, listen, and lead.

Culture
Leadership
Strategy
Execution
Innovation
Sales Transformation

Manoj has a unique ability to engage participants of all levels, creating a learning environment that is both stimulating and supportive. His sessions are thoughtfully designed, combining theory, practical exercises, and real-life examples that make the learning experience holistic and impactful.

His teaching style is dynamic, energetic, and highly motivational, making even complex subjects easy to grasp and apply. Beyond his technical expertise, Manoj inspires growth, self-awareness, and confidence.
